post.description: Finishes the batch harvest and returns a biological and financial report.

post.description: Cria um lote por tanque a partir de uma compra; custo proporcional; mesmo parent_group_id.

get.description:
Display a listing of companies.

Query params: page (int), limit (int), search (string - filters by name, cnpj, email).

delete.description:
Full reversal — deletes the allocation and undoes all side-effects.
Editing a partial allocation is intentionally NOT supported.

delete.description:
Hard delete — only succeeds when no transactions are linked.
The exception FinancialCategoryHasTransactionsException is handled by
the global exception Handler and returns a 422 domain error.

(transação, locks, trava financeira, biomassa, despesca e sincronização do contas a receber).

batchId.description: Must match the sale batch; cannot be changed.

stockingId.description: Must match the sale stocking; cannot be changed.

delete.description: Cancela a venda (rota distinta de excluir permanentemente o registro).

items.description: Quando enviado, substitui TODOS os itens existentes.

400.description: Erro de validação ou delta zero (quantidade física igual ao sistema)
